login_screen.title: Sign In
login_screen.subtitle: Enter your credentials to continue
login_screen.error_invalid_response: Invalid login response. Please try again.
login_screen.error_no_connection: No connection. Please check your internet.

bagsakan.title: Bagsakan
bagsakan.edit_confirm_message: This group already has a propagation source. Adding or removing items now might not be a good idea. Are you sure you want to continue?
bagsakan.no_items_hint: Scan barcode or search to add deliveries to this bagsakan.
bagsakan.error_empty_items: Please add at least one delivery to the bagsakan.
bagsakan.success_created: Bagsakan "{}" created and items transferred successfully.
bagsakan.already_added: This delivery is already in the bagsakan.
bagsakan.delete_confirm_message: All deliveries inside this bagsakan will be untagged and returned to your dashboard.
bagsakan.remove_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to remove "{}" from this bagsakan?
bagsakan.submit_confirm_message: This will propagate delivery data to all items in the group. Please ensure you have removed any failed deliveries from the group before proceeding.
bagsakan.submit_confirm_message_status: Are you sure? This will update all deliveries in this group to {}.
bagsakan.submit_confirm_message_status_reminder: Are you sure? This will update all deliveries in this group to {}. Please ensure you have removed all returned items from this bagsakan first.
bagsakan.submit_block_failed_in_group: Cannot submit as DELIVERED while there are failed deliveries in this group. Remove failed deliveries first.
bagsakan.success_submitted: Bagsakan submitted and data propagated successfully.
bagsakan.propagation_help_subtitle: How status and updates are copied when submitting a Bagsakan.
bagsakan.propagation_item_source_desc: The submit flow uses the propagation source first. If missing, it uses the most recently finalized updated delivery.
bagsakan.propagation_item_failed_desc: If a FAILED DELIVERY is chosen as the source, that same failed status propagates to the group. Check redelivery/return handling before submitting.
bagsakan.propagation_item_sync_desc: Submits are queued after the source status update to ensure correct propagation on the server.
bagsakan.propagation_help_footer: Before submitting: remove returned items and verify source delivery status.
bagsakan.submitted_locked_message: This item is part of a submitted Bagsakan group and is no longer accessible.
bagsakan.edit_locked_submitted: This Bagsakan group has already been submitted and cannot be edited.

dashboard.exit_confirm_subtitle: Are you sure you want to exit?

actions.dispatch_subtitle: Scan dispatch barcode to accept assignments

hero.subtitle: You have a great day ahead! Let's get these deliveries done.

account.inactive_account: Your account is inactive. Contact support for help.
account.logout_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to sign out?
account.pending_sync_message: You have {} pending sync items. Sign out anyway?

preferences.auto_accept_confirm_message: Auto-accept will automatically accept dispatches on your behalf.
preferences.compact_mode_sub: Show more deliveries in list view
preferences.dashboard_feel_sub: Enable a modern, premium dashboard layout
preferences.retention_update_message: Changing this setting will update how long history is kept locally.

legal.terms_sub: Read the full terms and conditions

screen.title: Wallet
screen.offline_message: You're offline — go online to see accumulated_earnings.
screen.existing_request_notice: You have already submitted a request today. You can consolidate your deliveries tomorrow.

request.offline_body:
Payout requests require an internet
connection. Please reconnect and try again.
request.request_window_denied: Payout requests are only allowed between {from} and {to}. Please try again during that window.
request.confirm_body: You are about to submit a payout request for:
request.confirm_warning: This action cannot be undone. Proceed?
request.already_submitted_today: You have already submitted a payout request today.
request.existing_request_details: You've already submitted a payout request today. Only one request per day is allowed. Your eligible deliveries will automatically be included in tomorrow's request if you submit again.
request.pending_request_warning: You have a pending payout request. Submitting another will combine all eligible deliveries into a single consolidated payout.
request.existing_request_today_notice: You have already submitted a request today.
request.no_eligible_deliveries: No eligible deliveries found for payout.

card.debug_only: DEBUG ONLY — not visible in production

banner.debug_window: (DEBUG) Time restriction bypassed — requests allowed at any hour.
banner.window_body: You can request a payout between {from} and {to}. Please come back during that window.

location.gps_required: Please enable GPS / Location Services and try again.
location.permission_permanently_denied: Location permission permanently denied. Enable it in Settings.
location.permission_required: Location permission is required to capture your position.
location.gps_disabled: GPS is disabled. Please turn on Location Services.
location.could_not_get_location: Could not get location. Ensure GPS is on and try again.

camera.permission_settings: Camera permission is required. Please enable it in Settings.
camera.permission_photo: Camera permission is required to take photos.

photo_recovered.success: A lost photo was successfully recovered.

status.locked: This delivery is locked and cannot be updated.

switch_status.title: SWITCH STATUS?
switch_status.content:
You have already filled in {detail} for {from}. Switching to {to} will clear all of that data.

Are you sure you want to continue?

discard_changes.title: Discard changes?
discard_changes.message: You have unsaved changes. Leave without submitting?

signature.capture_prompt: Do you want to capture the recipient's signature?

header.preset_hint: TAP A PRESET TO FILL — YOU CAN STILL ADD MORE DETAILS BELOW
header.tap_swipe_change_status: Tap or Swipe below to change status

hint.specify_reason_example: e.g. GATE IS LOCKED, NO CONTACT NUMBER

dialogs.reload_confirm_subtitle: This will clear your local delivery list and re-download it from the server. Pending sync updates will not be affected.
dialogs.retry_confirm_subtitle: This will attempt to upload this update to the server again.
dialogs.resolve_confirm_subtitle: This will mark the update as "Resolved" locally without sending it to the server. Use this if you have manually confirmed the state on the server.
dialogs.delete_confirm_subtitle: This will permanently remove this update from your sync queue. The local delivery status will NOT be reverted.

status.retention_remaining: History will be automatically cleared after {}

list.locked_general: This delivery is {} and cannot be opened.
list.locked_misrouted: This item is marked Misrouted and cannot be opened.
list.locked_delivered: This item has already been delivered and is locked.
list.locked_failed_max: This failed delivery has reached the maximum number of attempts and is locked.
list.locked_failed_verified: This failed delivery has already been verified and is no longer actionable.
list.profile_update_info: This entry is a profile update and has no delivery details.

permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.subtitle: FSI Courier needs the following permissions to function properly. Please enable all of them to continue.
permissions.status_permanently_denied: Permanently denied — open Settings to enable

location.label: Location
location.gps_off: GPS is turned off — required to verify delivery coordinates

dispatch.title: No pending dispatches
dispatch.subtitle: You're all caught up! Pull down to refresh if you're expecting a new batch.

delivery.info_misrouted: Misrouted items can't be opened. Return to FSI for verification.
delivery.info_delivered: Delivered items are final and can't be reopened.

help.title: Failed Delivery & Payouts
help.subtitle: How things work in the system
help.item_redelivery_desc: Failed deliveries may be attempted again if still eligible and not yet verified on-site. After 3 unsuccessful attempts, the item may be marked for return.
help.item_return_desc: If a delivery is returned to FSI, it will be reviewed by the site team for validation.
help.item_payment_desc: Validated items may be included in a payment request, subject to review and existing payment processes. Inclusion is not guaranteed.
help.footer_note: This ensures your payments are tracked accurately without manual intervention.

notifications.title: All caught up
notifications.subtitle: No notifications yet. Pull to refresh.

error_logs.title: No logs to show
error_logs.subtitle: Errors and warnings will appear here when they occur.
